---
title: "Pacotes & Código"
---

Meu perfil no GitHub está disponível em [github.com/rfsaldanha](https://github.com/rfsaldanha).

## Pacotes R

### microdatasus

Pacote R para baixar e pré-processar bases do DataSUS, do Ministério da Saúde do Brasil.

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/website-https://rfsaldanha.github.io/microdatasus-blue)](https://rfsaldanha.github.io/microdatasus/) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/rfsaldanha/microdatasus)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/microdatasus) [![](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/microdatasus/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/microdatasus/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)

### brpop

Pacote R com estimativas populacionais brasileiras.

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/website-https://rfsaldanha.github.io/brpop-blue)](https://rfsaldanha.github.io/brpop/) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/rfsaldanha/brpop)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/brpop) [![](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/brpop/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/brpop/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml) [![](https://img.shields.io/cran/v/brpop)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=brpop)

### tidyrates

Pacote R para calcular taxas epidemiológicas padronizadas por idade de forma tidy.

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/website-https://rfsaldanha.github.io/tidyrates-blue)](https://rfsaldanha.github.io/tidyrates/) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/rfsaldanha/tidyrates)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/tidyrates) [![](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/tidyrates/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/tidyrates/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml) [![](https://img.shields.io/cran/v/tidyrates)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=tidyrates)

### zendown

Pacote R para baixar e armazenar em cache arquivos de depósitos do Zenodo.

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/website-https://rfsaldanha.github.io/zendown-blue)](https://rfsaldanha.github.io/zendown/) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/rfsaldanha/zendown)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/zendown) [![](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/zendown/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/zendown/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml) [![](https://img.shields.io/cran/v/zendown)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=zendown)

### zenstats

Pacote R para obter estatísticas de visualizações, downloads e volume de depósitos do Zenodo.

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/website-https://rfsaldanha.github.io/zenstats-blue)](https://rfsaldanha.github.io/zenstats/) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/rfsaldanha/zenstats)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/zenstats) [![](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/zenstats/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/zenstats/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml) [![](https://img.shields.io/cran/v/zenstats)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=zenstats)

### nseq

Pacote R para calcular contagens e estatísticas de ocorrência de eventos em sequências que atendem a um critério.

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/website-https://rfsaldanha.github.io/nseq-blue)](https://rfsaldanha.github.io/nseq/) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/rfsaldanha/nseq)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/nseq) [![](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/nseq/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/nseq/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml) [![](https://img.shields.io/cran/v/nseq)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=nseq)

### rspell

Pacote R para revisar gramática de documentos dentro do RStudio.

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/website-https://rfsaldanha.github.io/rspell-blue)](https://rfsaldanha.github.io/rspell/) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/rfsaldanha/rspell)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/rspell) [![](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/rspell/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/rspell/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)

### brclimr

Pacote R para obter indicadores climáticos municipais do Brasil.

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/website-https://rfsaldanha.github.io/brclimr-blue)](https://rfsaldanha.github.io/brclimr/) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/rfsaldanha/brclimr)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/brclimr) [![](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/brclimr/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/brclimr/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml) [![](https://img.shields.io/cran/v/brclimr)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=brclimr)

### zonalclim

Pacote R com funções auxiliares para calcular estatísticas zonais usando NetCDF e objetos sf em estudos climáticos.

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/website-https://rfsaldanha.github.io/zonalclim-blue)](https://rfsaldanha.github.io/zonalclim/) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/rfsaldanha/zonalclim)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/zonalclim) [![](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/zonalclim/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/zonalclim/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)

### plugfieldapi

Pacote R para acessar a API Plugfield e obter dados de estações meteorológicas.

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/website-https://rfsaldanha.github.io/plugfieldapi-blue)](https://rfsaldanha.github.io/plugfieldapi/) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/rfsaldanha/plugfieldapi)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/plugfieldapi) [![](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/plugfieldapi/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/plugfieldapi/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)

### opendenguedata

Pacote R para baixar dados de dengue do projeto OpenDengue.

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/website-https://rfsaldanha.github.io/opendenguedata-blue)](https://rfsaldanha.github.io/opendenguedata/) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/rfsaldanha/opendenguedata)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/opendenguedata) [![](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/opendenguedata/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/opendenguedata/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)

### inmetrss

Pacote R para obter e processar o feed RSS de alertas do INMET.

[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/website-https://rfsaldanha.github.io/inmetrss-blue)](https://rfsaldanha.github.io/inmetrss/) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/rfsaldanha/inmetrss)](https://github.com/rfsaldanha/inmetrss)

## Estatísticas de download dos pacotes

As estatísticas de download dos pacotes no CRAN estão disponíveis [aqui](https://rfsaldanha.github.io/pkgdash/#packages-on-cran).
